title.rationale: Canonical identifier for the research work.

year.rationale: Establishes the temporal context of the research.

abstract.rationale: Provides a concise overview of the research objectives and findings.

doi.rationale: A unique identifier for accessing the paper online.

venue.rationale: Indicates where the research was presented or published.

problem_statement.rationale: Clarifies the specific issue that the research addresses.

methodology.rationale: Details the approach taken to solve the research problem.

algorithm.rationale: Identifies the core method introduced in the paper.

features.rationale: Highlights the important aspects that differentiate this method.

adaptations.rationale: Explains how prior methods were adapted for this research.

experiments.rationale: Provides insight into the validation of the proposed method.

datasets.rationale: Shows the data sources for evaluating the method.

metrics.rationale: Indicates how the results were measured.

results.rationale: Presents the outcomes of the experiments conducted.

performance.rationale: Quantifies the effectiveness of the proposed method.

comparisons.rationale: Shows how the method stands against existing approaches.

conclusions.description: Main conclusions drawn from the research
conclusions.rationale: Summarizes the implications of the findings.

future_work.rationale: Identifies potential areas for further exploration.

reproducibility_metadata.rationale: Ensures that other researchers can replicate the findings.

code_url.description: Link to the source code repository
code_url.rationale: Facilitates access to the implementation of the methods.

data_url.rationale: Provides access to the data necessary for reproducing results.

environment.rationale: Specifies the hardware and software used for experiments.
